mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_rad_source WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE status WHEN '만료' THEN 0 WHEN '임박' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, expire_date ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_rad_source WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rad_source WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rad_source WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rad_source WHERE deleted = 0 AND expire_date IS NOT NULL AND DATEDIFF(DAY, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE), expire_date) BETWEEN 0 AND #{days}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_rad_source (mgmt_no, name, source_type, isotope, activity, maker, location, permit_no, permit_date, expire_date, status, owner_name, maker_no, note, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{mgmtNo}, #{name}, #{sourceType}, #{isotope}, #{activity}, #{maker}, #{location}, #{permitNo}, #{permitDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{expireDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}'유효', #{ownerName}, #{makerNo}, #{note}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_rad_source SET mgmt_no = #{mgmtNo}, name = #{name}, source_type = #{sourceType}, isotope = #{isotope}, activity = #{activity}, maker = #{maker}, location = #{location}, permit_no = #{permitNo}, permit_date = #{permitDate,jdbcType=DATE}, expire_date = #{expireDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, owner_name = #{ownerName}, maker_no = #{makerNo}, note = #{note}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_rad_source SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
